title: Add `--version` flag to the `sy` CLI
body:
## Linear

- Issue: https://linear.app/inductive-network/issue/IN-318/add-version-flag-to-the-sy-cli

## Summary

Makes `sy --version` print `Symphony <version>` and exit 0.
diff:
diff --git a/symphony/cli.py b/symphony/cli.py
@@ def _add_version_argument(parser):
-        version=f"{parser.prog} {__version__}",
+        version=f"Symphony {__version__}",

diff --git a/tests/test_cli.py b/tests/test_cli.py
@@ def test_version_exits_successfully_without_workflow_file(self):
-        self.assertIn(__version__, stdout.getvalue())
+        self.assertIn(f"Symphony {__version__}", stdout.getvalue())
